# Life in 24 Hours - MERN Stack Project

## Project Overview
Personal Time Reality Analyzer using MERN stack with MongoDB Compass for data analytics.

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: React.js + Vite + Chart.js
- Backend: Node.js + Express.js
- Database: MongoDB Atlas
- Analytics: MongoDB Compass
- Auth: JWT (JSON Web Tokens)

## Project Structure
- `/backend` - Express.js API server with controllers, models, routes, middleware
- `/frontend` - React.js application with Vite bundler

## Completed Steps
✅ Project structure created
✅ Backend setup with Express, MongoDB, JWT auth
✅ Frontend setup with React, Vite, Chart.js
✅ User authentication (register/login)
✅ Activity logging and management
✅ Analytics dashboard with charts
✅ MongoDB aggregation pipelines
✅ Dependencies installed
✅ Environment configuration files created
✅ Comprehensive documentation

## Setup Instructions
1. Configure MongoDB Atlas connection in `backend/.env`
2. Start backend: `cd backend && npm run dev`
3. Start frontend: `cd frontend && npm run dev`
4. Access app at http://localhost:3000

See QUICKSTART.md for detailed setup guide.
